'''ravojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zebroid|zebroid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-v-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zebroid|zebroid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ravojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rævejeth|rævejeth]] || [[word:rævejej|rævejej]] || [[word:rævejesh|rævejesh]] || [[word:ræveje|ræveje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ravovojoth|ravovojoth]] || [[word:ravovojoj|ravovojoj]] || [[word:ravovojosh|ravovojosh]] || [[word:ravovojo|ravovojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ravojoth|ravojoth]] || [[word:ravojoj|ravojoj]] || [[word:ravojosh|ravojosh]] || [[word:ravojo|ravojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ravofjoth|ravofjoth]] || [[word:ravofjoj|ravofjoj]] || [[word:ravofjosh|ravofjosh]] || [[word:ravofjof|ravofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ravojotho|ravojotho]] || [[word:ravojojo|ravojojo]] || [[word:ravojosho|ravojosho]] || [[word:ravojoko|ravojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ravojoth|ravojoth]] || [[word:ravojoj|ravojoj]] || [[word:ravojosh|ravojosh]] || [[word:ravojo|ravojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ravojothol|ravojothol]] || [[word:ravojojol|ravojojol]] || [[word:ravojoshol|ravojoshol]] || [[word:ravojokol|ravojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ravojothotho|ravojothotho]] || [[word:ravojojojo|ravojojojo]] || [[word:ravojoshosho|ravojoshosho]] || [[word:ravojoko|ravojoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ravojothon|ravojothon]] || [[word:ravojojon|ravojojon]] || [[word:ravojoshon|ravojoshon]] || [[word:ravojokon|ravojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ravojothoro|ravojothoro]] || [[word:ravojojoro|ravojojoro]] || [[word:ravojoshoro|ravojoshoro]] || [[word:ravojokoro|ravojokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
